title: Ultimate Claude Code Guide: How to Use Claude Code for Beginners in 2026
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrating Claude Code, an AI-assisted coding tool that allows users to build applications using plain English instructions. The guide covers practical projects including landing pages, Chrome extensions, image captioning, and habit trackers, plus comparison of Claude Opus and Sonnet models with emphasis on debugging and error resolution workflows.
